    Reymond Akpanya

    Postdoctoral Research Associate in Mathematics at the University of Sydney. Working with Prof. John Voight. Research in combinatorial topology, simplicial surfaces, and topological interlocking assemblies.

    • Sydney, Australia
    • The University of Sydney

    CV

    Education

    Postdoc 2025 – present

    Postdoctoral Research Associate

    The University of Sydney — School of Mathematics and Statistics

    Working with John Voight

    PhD 2021 – 2025

    PhD (Dr. rer. nat.) in Mathematics

    RWTH Aachen University

    Thesis: Constructing Symmetric Simplicial Surfaces, Supervisors: Alice C. Niemeyer, Wilhelm Plesken; Additional Referees: Jonathan Spreer, Daniel Robertz

    Master of Science in Mathematics

    RWTH Aachen University

    Minor: Business Studies · Supervisors: Alice C. Niemeyer, Wilhelm Plesken

    RWTH Aachen University

    RMIT University — 3 weeks

    Melbourne, Australia

    Host: Yi Min Xie · Project: Construction of Tubular Topological Interlocking Assemblies

    Melbourne, Australia

    Host: Yi Min Xie · Project: Topological Interlocking Assemblies with prescribed boundary conditions

    University of Sydney — 6 months

    Sydney, Australia

    Collaboration with Jonathan Spreer · Classification of face-transitive surfaces; 2-transitive simplicial surfaces

    Queen Mary University of London — 9 months

    London, United Kingdom
